title: Unknown MessagePart type
description: OpenCode returns a MessagePart with a type not in the known enum variants. The part must be stored as event_type='unknown' with raw_type and raw data, not silently dropped.
production_scenario: OpenCode adds new part types (e.g., image, video, custom-widget) that the rust-brain parser doesn't know about yet. These must be persisted as opaque events for forward compatibility, not lost.
